headline: 2 High-Flying Stocks with Solid Fundamentals and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: "You get what you pay for" often applies to expensive stocks with best-in-class business models and execution. While their quality can sometimes justify the premium, they typically experience elevated volatility during market downturns when expectations change.

raw.headline: 2 High-Flying Stocks with Solid Fundamentals and 1 Facing Challenges

headline: ABM Industries Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: ABM Industries (NYSE:ABM) reported what management described as a “solid start” to fiscal 2026, highlighted by broad-based organic revenue growth, improved free cash flow, and significant share repurchases, while also acknowledging a quarterly margin shortfall concentrated in its Technical Solutions

headline: FORTUNE Names Cintas to its 2026 World’s Most Admired Companies List
summary: CINCINNATI, March 10, 2026--This marks the 18th time the business services leader earned this award for its strong reputation and innovation.
